ab: ’ita’ saboeh kayzaeh, kaysa’an yako ’am maraS ’inimon rima’ ray ’asang somingozaw ka tatini’.
ch: A:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去部落訪問耆老。
en: A: Hello everyone, today I’m taking you to the tribe to interview the elders.

ch: B:好喔!我們要跟耆老說賽夏語。

en: A: Are we almost there?
B:Almost there.
A: Grandpa, we’ve come to see you.

ch: B:你們會說賽夏語啊!真是太棒了!
en: B: You speak SaySiyat! That’s great!

ab: ’ita’ saboeh kayzaeh, kaysa’an kamatortoroe’ ’am maraS hi moyo rima’ ray kapamowa’an ka tata’ matawaw.
ch: A:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去小米田工作。
en: A:Hello everyone, today I will take you to work in the millet field.
B: Yes, sir.

ab: wa’ila rini, ’i:zi ngowip ’araS ka kakrangi’an nom matawaw.
ch: A:大家過來排隊，記得帶好工具。
en: A: Come and line up, remember to bring your tools.

ab: ’a:ay, kamatortoroe’, yami hayza’ mari’ ka kakrangi’an.
ch: B:是的，老師，我們都拿好工具了。
en: B: Yes, sir, we’ve got our tools.
A: Are we there yet?
B: Not yet, it’s still far away.
A: You go watering.
B: Okay, I’ll water it.

ab: So’o Sa’ila mari’ nom Somowaw ka kabkabaehae:.
en: A: You go get the bird catcher.
B: Okay, I’ll go and catch the birds.

ab: ’ita’ saboeh kayzaeh, kaysa’an ’ita’ ’am rima’ ray kaSopanan ka Sinpanan.
ch: A:大家好，我們今天要去動物園。
en: A: Hello everyone, we are going to the zoo today.

ch: B:好棒喔!我們要怎麼去呢?
en: B: Awesome! How are we going to get there?
A: Let’s take the bus.

ab: wa’ila rini, ’am bae:iw ka pinaSkira:a’ kina:at.
ch: A:大家過來這裡，我們準備買票。
en: A: Everyone come here, we are ready to buy tickets.
B: Yes.

ab: ray kati’aelae’ kakita’an ka kabkabaehae:, ray hikor kakita’an ka Siba:i’, moyo nonak Sa’ila kita’.
ch: A:前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。
en: A: There are birds in the front and snakes in the back.
B: I’m afraid of snakes.

ab: kayzaeh, So’o Sa’ila kita’ ka kabkabaehae:.
en: A: It doesn’t matter, then you go and watch the birds.

ab: ’ita’ ’aehae’ ka Sinepe: sizaeh lobih rini raroton.
ch: A:我們一個小時後回來集合。
en: A: We’ll be back in an hour.
B: Yes, thank you.
A: What did you see today?

ab: ya:o komita’ ’akoy ka Siba:i’ ki kabkabaehae:.
ch: B:我看到了好多蛇，還有好多鳥。
en: B: I saw a lot of snakes and a lot of birds.
A: Hurry up, we have to go.
B: Wait for me, my feet are tired.

ab: ’ita’ roSa’ ta’ila ta lalangoy kayzaeh ay?
ch: A:我們兩個一起去游泳好嗎?
en: A: Let’s go swimming together, shall we?
B:Yes! Let’s go!
A: There are a lot of people swimming here.

ab: risaza ka ralom ’i:zo’ a tomalan, ’ita’ rini lalangoy kayzaeh ila.
ch: B:那裡水很深，我們在這裡游泳就好。
en: B: The water is deep there, so we just swim here.
